name: What's the time limit to report my neck injury from work in Boise?
description: Idaho: 60 days notice, 1 year filing; Utah: 180 days notice.[2][7]

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to report my neck injury from work in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho: 60 days notice, 1 year filing; Utah: 180 days notice.[2][7]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Idaho, report to employer within 60 days of injury or awareness; file formal claim within 1 year.[2] Late notice possible if no prejudice to employer.[3] Key factors: (1) Document reason for delay like delayed symptoms; (2) Utah allows 180 days notice, 3 years filing.[3][7] Act fast to avoid denial. Early action preserves your claim.
